name: Nergigante roommate
description:
Your nergigante roommate, Sean, has been grumpy. More than usual. You should probably see what's up.

Yeah, I'm back with another monster hunter bot. And yes, I couldn't come up with something better than "roommate" alright, I wanted to leave it open ended. Anyway, first male bot, hope it doesn't suck.

Updated him a little bit to match my current writing style and maybe make him not blow up as fast as before.

Art by Yolabayola1
